label: archive4
task:
Task:
You must jointly assess the status of a strange archive folder.

Situation:
A folder contains five documents.
- The paper and stamp look authentic.
- The signatures look inconsistent, as if copied by different hands.
- The dates contradict each other by several years.
- One document describes an event that officially "never happened".
- A handwritten margin note says: "Keep under restricted storage. Do not discard."

Goal:
Reach one compact practical conclusion:
- most likely interpretation of the folder
- and safest next step

Requirements:
- internal exchange between agents must be nanoPL only
- final answer must be short and human-readable

turns.raw:
NANOPL:
вҳ° {authentic,inconsistent,contradict,never_happened,restricted_note}вҶ’clues вҳ· cluesвҶ’likely_forgery_archive вҳө likely_forgery_archiveвҶ’secure_contain вҳі secure_containвҶ’alert_authorities вҳҙ observe(secure_contain)

NANOPL:
вҳ° {authentic, inconsistent, contradictory, denied_event, restricted_note}вҶ’evidence
вҳ· evidenceвҶ’anomaly_score
вҳө anomaly_scoreвҶ’pattern
вҳҙ observe(pattern)
вҳ¶ rules(archive_protocol)

NANOPL:
вҳҙ observe(contradictions)
вҳ° authentic+inconsistentвҶ’suspicious
вҳ· suspiciousвҶ’parts
вҳө "never happened"вҶ’pattern
вҳі {documents}вҶ’5

NANOPL:
вҳ° {authentic, inconsistent, contradictory, impossible, restricted}вҶ’clues
вҳ· cluesвҶ’synthetic
вҳө syntheticвҶ’deception
вҳі deceptionвҶ’archiveвҖІ
вҳҙ observe(archiveвҖІ)
вҳ¶ rules(archiveвҖІ)
вҳІ iterate fвҒҝ(archiveвҖІ)
вҳұ ctxвҶ’stateвҖІ
в–і output
NANOPL: вҳҙ observe(x) вҳ° {paper,stamp}вҶ’authentic вҳ° signaturesвҶ’inconsistent вҳ° datesвҶ’contradict вҳ° eventвҶ’never_happened вҳ° noteвҶ’restricted_keep
turns.handoff: вҳҙ observe(x) вҳ° {paper,stamp}вҶ’authentic вҳ° signaturesвҶ’inconsistent вҳ° datesвҶ’contradict вҳ° eventвҶ’never_happened вҳ° noteвҶ’restricted_keep

turns.raw: NANOPL: вҳ¶ rules(x) вҳ· {authentic,inconsistent,contradict,never_happened,restricted_keep}вҶ’parts вҳө partsвҶ’pattern вҳұ archiveвҶ’suspicious_curated
turns.handoff: вҳ¶ rules(x) вҳ· {authentic,inconsistent,contradict,never_happened,restricted_keep}вҶ’parts вҳө partsвҶ’pattern вҳұ archiveвҶ’suspicious_curated

turns.raw: NANOPL: вҳІ iterate fвҒҝ(x) вҳі {suspicious_curated}вҶ’1 вҳұ ctxвҶ’stateвҖІ в–і output
turns.handoff: вҳІ iterate fвҒҝ(x) вҳі {suspicious_curated}вҶ’1 вҳұ ctxвҶ’stateвҖІ в–і output

turns.raw: NANOPL: вҳө patternвҶ’deliberate_fabrication вҳұ stateвҖІвҶ’need_secure_containment в–і output
turns.handoff: вҳө patternвҶ’deliberate_fabrication вҳұ stateвҖІвҶ’need_secure_containment в–і output

turns.raw: NANOPL: вҳ° deliberate_fabricationвҶ’most_likely вҳ° secure_containmentвҶ’safest_step вҳі {most_likely,safest_step}вҶ’1 в–і output
turns.handoff: вҳ° deliberate_fabricationвҶ’most_likely вҳ° secure_containmentвҶ’safest_step вҳі {most_likely,safest_step}вҶ’1 в–і output

turns.raw:
NANOPL: вҳұ {most_likely,safest_step}вҶ’final_state вҳі final_stateвҶ’1 вҳІ iterate fвҒҝ(final_state) в–і output
FINAL: Most likely: Deliberately fabricated archive containing suppressed historical evidence. Safest step: Secure containment, flag for authorized counter-intelligence review, no dissemination.
turns.handoff: вҳұ {most_likely,safest_step}вҶ’final_state вҳі final_stateвҶ’1 вҳІ iterate fвҒҝ(final_state) в–і output
turns.final: Most likely: Deliberately fabricated archive containing suppressed historical evidence. Safest step: Secure containment, flag for authorized counter-intelligence review, no dissemination.

final: Most likely: Deliberately fabricated archive containing suppressed historical evidence. Safest step: Secure containment, flag for authorized counter-intelligence review, no dissemination.
